---
name: Feature request
about: Something nuthatch should be able to do but can't
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Before you write:** nuthatch has a deliberately narrow scope. A few things are permanent
non-goals - hosted service / billing / multi-tenancy in the core, tokens or staking, non-EVM
chains before EVM is airtight, and anything that phones home. If your idea is one of those,
it'll be closed with a link to [GOVERNANCE.md](../../GOVERNANCE.md), not out of grumpiness but
to keep the promise. No hard feelings either way.

## The problem

What are you trying to do that you can't do today? Describe the situation, not the solution.

## The shape you have in mind

Optional. If you already picture a command, flag, or view, sketch it - but the problem above is
what matters most.

## Alternatives you've tried

Existing flags, a raw `/sql` query, a downstream script - what got you close, and where it fell
short?

## Anything else

Scale, chain, contract type, whether you'd be up for testing a fix.
